title: Moonstone: Other
description: Moonstone's independent branch has added many useful accessories to the game
body:
## be careful:
This mod is an **independent branch** of Moonstone and can be used without using the original mod.

But it is **not** recommended to use Moonstone Mod again!

## Main text description:
This mod adds a lot of useful items, such as hearts that can triple some loot or stones that can convert lower bound rocks into experience points：
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45afa9f3ec1ed8c124fb360ef603aa15b240afbb.png)
![nether break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/036768f32e58b7b5430d8a020826488eec9108f8.png)
